Description: Export your entire Umbraco site structure to YAML — DataTypes, DocumentTypes, Media Types, Templates, Content, Media, Languages, Dictionary Items, Members, and Users. One click in the Settings dashboard produces a portable YAML + media ZIP you can version-control and replay anywhere using the companion Yaml2Schema package. v2.x supports Umbraco 14-17 (net8.0/net9.0/net10.0). For Umbraco 13, use v1.x from the support/umbraco-13 branch.

AuthorDetails.Name: Carlos Casalicchio
AuthorDetails.Description: Developer at SplatDev. Building tools to make Umbraco development faster and more reproducible.

RelatedPackages.Description: Companion package — imports a YAML file and bootstraps your entire Umbraco structure on startup. Supports Umbraco 17.

Screenshots.Caption: Schema Export dashboard — one-click YAML + media ZIP download
